name: org-strict
description: Strict org policy: inherits default-open-source (CodeQL/Trivy/gitleaks/conventional-commits/base-image-allowlist) and adds required commit signing, required k8s labels, and a chainguard/distroless-only base-image allowlist.

validators.message: k8s Deployment must set app.kubernetes.io/name label
Strict: only chainguard / distroless base images
